maintainerReportedDefects: lower-face proportions appear shortened during speech

causalCompilerFindings: an 11-word line was forced into a minimum 5.5-second speech window

economical articulation and minimal mouth movement could suppress phoneme-complete lower-face motion

claimBoundary: Prompt fields are authored intent. Provider adherence, fine lip sync, facial biomechanics, and voice identity require returned-media evidence.
